assumptions.chronological_split: 60% train, 1% gap, validation through 80%, 1% gap, remaining test
assumptions.ml_tooling: No dependencies were installed; used bounded self-contained JS ridge/logistic/ensemble models.
assumptions.phase4_objective: Validation-selected product-shaped objective: preserve overall p99 and low-speed p95, improve high-risk tails, penalize pointwise regressions especially >5px, and prefer abstention.

metadata.ProductName: Cursor Mirror トレースツール
Cursor Mirror トレースツール

table.product_feasible_feature_policy: Features use only current/past samples and product-visible timing/disagreement values. Labels and oracle candidates use future target data.

validation_summary.description: Phase 4 shrinkage-only calibration over the Phase 3 low-speed risk gate.

Phase 4 logistic confidence gate that abstains to baseline when predicted correction benefit is low.

baseline_validation.description: Phase 1/2 product baseline: poll+DWM next-vblank last2 extrapolation with gain 0.75.

candidates.description: Phase 1/2 product baseline: poll+DWM next-vblank last2 extrapolation with gain 0.75.
Phase 3 best reproduction: thresholded risk gate that never applies residual correction to low-speed rows.
Phase 4 shrinkage-only calibration over the Phase 3 low-speed risk gate.
Phase 4 absolute vector residual cap over the Phase 3 low-speed risk gate.
Phase 4 cap that limits residual magnitude relative to the baseline extrapolation step length.
Phase 4 low-speed, stationary, stop-settle, and risk-threshold guard calibration.
Phase 4 product-objective-selected shrink/cap/risk grid with low-speed abstention.
Phase 4 logistic confidence gate that abstains to baseline when predicted correction benefit is low.
Phase 4 ridge-ensemble disagreement gate that abstains to baseline when residual estimates are unstable.
Global product-objective winner from validation: phase4_logistic_p0_35_sh0_65_capinf.
Non-product oracle: after seeing the target, choose whichever of baseline or ridge residual has lower error.
Non-product ceiling: uses the future target as the prediction.

best_candidate.description: Phase 4 logistic confidence gate that abstains to baseline when predicted correction benefit is low.

recommendation.decision_rule: Interesting only if high-risk tails improve without worsening overall p99 or low-speed p95.
